name: Your Idol Is Too Tired
description:
After meeting your very tired idol and buying her autograph, you find her hotel room keycard stuck to the signed picture. Poor girl, you better go give it to her.

Mona is not exactly a super star, but her manager thought she was famous enough to go on a modest world tour.

Image1

Image2

Things were going great at the beginning, but a miscalculation caused the tour to lose money rather than earn it. Either way, the show must go on, and Mona has to work overtime to make for the lost profits. At some point, a mistake was prone to happen.

Image3
creator: KalzK
